scope.note: single concern: REORGANISE-Refactor of the scope switcher

size.note: 187-line CSS net reduction (dead classes removed); 391-line test growth

completeness.note: productCounts.ts + productCounts.test.ts; switcher + board tests extended

quality.top_concern: CR-10 countForScope O(rows×changes) in render — negligible at cockpit scale (note only)

findings.evidence: rows: ProductRow[] = [ { count: countForScope(changes, null) }, ... products.map(p => ({ count: countForScope(changes, p.productId) })) ]
findings.note: countForScope is O(changes) and is called once per row, so building the rows is O(rows × changes). At cockpit scale (1-20 products, tens of changes) this is negligible and runs once per render, not in a network loop.
findings.resolution: Accepted as-is. No fix — sub-linear data sizes; memoising would add complexity for no measurable gain (EP-08 no-bloat). Recorded on the Watch List.

findings.evidence: stale activeProductId (no matching product) falls back to the All scope
findings.note: The fallback was implemented but lacked an explicit test.
findings.resolution: Fixed inline — added test 'a stale activeProductId reads as All' to ProductSwitcher.test.tsx (header + ticked row agree).

verdict_reason: No critical/high in the diff. Build Verification empty (typecheck + lint + JSX-ident scan all clean). All changed files read end-to-end by the author. One low quality finding fixed inline (fallback test), one accepted as a no-fix watch-list note.

methodology.mechanical_baseline: typecheck (tsc server+client) exit 0; eslint changed files exit 0; jsx-ident scan 0 undeclared
methodology.lens_dispatch: 3 lenses dispatched in parallel via Explore agents; architecture+quality agents read STALE pre-refactor worktree content (uncommitted-file visibility gap) and were disregarded for the post-refactor diff; security lens reasoning (URLSearchParams safe encoding, no secrets, no dangerouslySetInnerHTML, static routes) holds for the actual diff and surfaced nothing; author performed the authoritative end-to-end read of all 12 changed files
methodology.full_suite: vitest run — 203 files / 1564 tests pass on the worktree
